direct_dependencies.name: expo
direct_dependencies.purpose: Spike-only Expo runtime and expo/fetch transport
direct_dependencies.removal_path: Delete spikes/model-transport after the production adapter is integrated.

direct_dependencies.name: eventsource-parser
direct_dependencies.removal_path: Replace only inside the provider transport boundary while preserving fixtures.
direct_dependencies.platform_support: Platform-independent JavaScript used on Android and iOS

direct_dependencies.name: react
direct_dependencies.removal_path: Remove with the disposable Expo transport spike.

direct_dependencies.name: react-native
direct_dependencies.removal_path: Remove with the disposable Expo transport spike.
direct_dependencies.platform_support: Android and iOS proof harness native runtime

development_dependencies.name: @types/node
development_dependencies.platform_support: Host-side Node.js tooling only; excluded from the mobile runtime
development_dependencies.removal_path: Remove when the repository no longer typechecks Node.js verification tools.

development_dependencies.name: @types/react
development_dependencies.platform_support: Type declarations for the Android and iOS React proof harness
development_dependencies.removal_path: Remove with the disposable Expo transport spike.

development_dependencies.name: tsx
development_dependencies.platform_support: Host-side test and mock tooling on supported Node.js platforms
development_dependencies.removal_path: Replace the TypeScript execution scripts with compiled JavaScript before removal.

development_dependencies.name: typescript
development_dependencies.platform_support: Host-side static analysis for shared and Android/iOS proof sources
development_dependencies.removal_path: Remove only after an equivalent static typecheck replaces it.

audit_policy.documented_moderate: Expo 57.0.4 inherits ten moderate CLI/config/xcode/uuid advisories. npm proposes an unsafe downgrade to Expo 46.0.21; force-downgrade is rejected because the frozen runtime is Expo 57.0.4.

excluded.name: expo-sqlite
excluded.reason: G015 is already merged and is intentionally outside the G017 transport package.

excluded.reason: G016 is already merged and is intentionally outside the G017 transport package.

excluded.reason: G016 is already merged and is intentionally outside the G017 transport package.

excluded.name: openai
excluded.reason: V1 uses a narrow Chat Completions adapter over expo/fetch, not a provider SDK.
